caption: The video captures a man speaking into a microphone while standing behind a podium, addressing an audience. He is wearing glasses, a white shirt, and a black vest adorned with intricate designs. A guitar is partially visible next to him, suggesting he might be a musician or performer. The setting appears to be indoors, with wooden blinds covering the windows in the background. The audience, seen from behind, consists of several people attentively listening to the speaker. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner of the screen, indicating the possible affiliation or organization associated with the event. The atmosphere seems formal yet intimate, as the speaker engages with his audience.
